---
title: "resume"
author: Kyle Tolliver
output: pagedown::html_resume
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Aside
====================================

Contact Info {#contact}
------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> kyle@tollivers.org

- <i class="fa fa-phone"></i> [(805)367-6723](tel: 18053676723)

- <i class="fa fa-linkedin"></i> [kctolli](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kctolli/)

- <i class="fas fa-globe-americas"></i> [kctolli.github.io](https://kctolli.github.io/)

Skills {#skills}
------------------------------------

- R/Rmd 
- YAML
- Python
- C/C++
- Tableau
- Excel
- SQL
- HTML 
- CSS
- Java
- Verilog
- Embedded C
- Assembly
- Github

Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
------------------------------------

This resume was made with <br /> the R package [pagedown](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown).

<!-- Last updated on `r format(Sys.Date(), format="%B %d %Y")`. -->

<!-- Kyle Tolliver --- Resume -->


Main
====================================

Kyle Tolliver {#title}
------------------------------------

Education {data-icon=graduation-cap}
------------------------------------

### Brigham Young University - Idaho

Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering <br/> Associate of Applied Science in Data Science

Rexburg, ID

2017 <br> | <br> 2020

+ Minor: Computer Engineering
+ Honors: Tau Beta Pi
+ Societies: Data Science Society
+ Coursework: <!-- Machine Learning, Intermediate Stats, --> Data Intuition, Data Wrangling, Data Structures, Software Development, Web Development, Database Development, System Security, Digital Systems Design, Advanced Embedded Systems, Computer Architecture, Circuit Theory and Analysis, Project Management, Linear Algebra, Discrete Math, Differential Calculus  

Experience {data-icon=briefcase}
------------------------------------

### Research Specialist Intern

LLNL - Lawrence Livermore National Labs

Remote

2020

+ Research & Business Development Center's Applied Learning Project
+ FPGA Development and Cybersecurity 

### Student Senior Design Project

NASA - National Aeronautics and Space Administration

Remote

2020

+ Developed embedded C interface to the sensors in NASA's Spacesuit 
+ Benchmark tested the microprocessor in C++
+ Setup a [website](https://ecen499-nasa.github.io/) using Rmds, CSS and Yaml

### Teaching Assistant and Tutor

BYU - Idaho, Computer Science and Engineering 

Rexburg, ID

2018  <br> | <br>  2020

+ Lead students to increase their knowledge
+ Guide students to improvement by giving feedback
+ Help students with programming Verilog, C/C++ and Embedded C

Projects {data-icon=laptop}
------------------------------------

### COVID-19 Data Consulting

BYU - Idaho, Computer Science and Engineering 

Remote

2020

+ Developed a data [website](https://kctolli.github.io/COVID-19/) using R, Rmds and Yaml
+ Explored different datasets to determine viable information
+ Wrote my own COVID-19 R package to wrangle data
+ Visualized the data to make the data easily understood

### Biology Exam Data Analysis

BYU - Idaho, Biology

Rexburg, ID

2020 

+ Used R and the Tidyverse package to wrangle and visualize data
+ Allowed professors to help improve curriculum
